title: [📦] CIECIVA?
description: A 1.20.1 modpack that optimizes minecraft and changes the "Minecraft feel" while staying as close to vanilla as possible
body:
**C**an **I** **E**ven **C**all **I**t **V**anilla **A**nymore?

A 1.20 modpack that optimizes minecraft and changes the "Minecraft feel" while staying as close to vanilla as possible
